This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Accelerometer: Permissions-Policy header accelerometer=* allows same-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] Accelerometer: Permissions-Policy header accelerometer=* allows cross-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined

  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] LinearAccelerationSensor: Permissions-Policy header accelerometer=* allows cross-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined

  test_feature_availability is not defined
